name: Cabbage Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together thoroughly.
2. Pour the mixture into a 9 x 5 x 3 inches loaf baking pan.
3. Place bacon strips on top.
4. Bake for 1 1/2 hours in an oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
- After 45 minutes, drain any bacon grease that has formed.
- During the last 15 minutes of baking:
Add tomato paste on top.
Turn off the oven.
- After 15 minutes, add cheese slices and allow them to melt.
